title: allium roseum subsp. roseum
intro: Allium roseum subsp. roseum, also known as the Rosy Garlic or Rosy Ornamental Onion, is a perennial plant in the Allium genus. It is commonly used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include its antimicrobial, antiviral, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Allium roseum subsp. roseum include its ability to support respiratory health, reduce inflammation, and act as a natural antibiotic. Herbal preparations of the plant include dried flowers, leaves, and bulbs, which can be used in teas, tinctures, and salves to harness its medicinal properties.
